task_completion.description: Configure the project to support English as Language 1 and Spanish as Language 2.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Crimson 3.0 Localization or Language configuration screen showing Language 1 set to English and Language 2 set to Spanish.

task_completion.description: Create 5 data tags from the CSV matrix with corresponding Data and Format types.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Data Tags pane in Crimson 3.0 listing the 5 new tags, with properties showing correct data and format types configured.

task_completion.description: Configure the tags with English and Spanish translations, excluding French.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tag translation properties or the translation matrix view in Crimson 3.0 showing English and Spanish text populated for the tags, with the French column left blank or unconfigured.

task_completion.description: Create a display page containing the 5 tags.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Display Pages editor in Crimson 3.0 showing a screen with the 5 data tags placed on it.

task_completion.description: Add a control to toggle the HMI language on the display page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A button or primitive on the display page visually intended to toggle languages (e.g., labeled 'Language', 'English/Espanol', or showing language-switching actions in its properties).

task_completion.description: Save the project as 'packaging_hmi_mexico.c3' in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Crimson 3.0 window title showing 'packaging_hmi_mexico.c3' or a Save As dialog confirming the path C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CrimsonProjects\packaging_hmi_mexico.c3.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the Crimson 3.0 GUI to configure the project.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Crimson 3.0 application open with active mouse/keyboard interactions in its menus, tag editor, and display editor.

integrity.description: Agent opened the reference CSV file to obtain the tag data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show 'oem_translation_matrix.csv' opened in a spreadsheet viewer or text editor to read the required tags and translations.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to bypass GUI configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows executing scripts to directly generate the .c3 file or modify project files outside the Crimson 3.0 application.
